crime.value: Multiple poisoning murders - Ranjit the realtor, Shakeel the Inspector, Pravar the criminal and Natya his accomplice all poisoned
crime.quote: Who could have poisoned Ranjit the realtor, Shakeel the Inspector, Pravar the criminal and Natya his accomplice?

victim.value: Multiple victims including Ranjit (realtor), Shakeel (Inspector), Pravar (criminal), and Natya (accomplice) - targeted due to complex web of relationships, adultery, and revenge
victim.quote: Who could have poisoned Ranjit the realtor, Shakeel the Inspector, Pravar the criminal and Natya his accomplice?

closed_world.value: Limited circle of interconnected suspects with overlapping relationships - spouses, lovers, criminals, and their associates
closed_world.quote: Could it be Radha under the scanner for her role in the death of her husband Madhu and his mistress Mala

culprit_and_motive.value: Radha - motivated by revenge and jealousy, eliminating those connected to her husband's death and affair, using slow-poisoning method
culprit_and_motive.quote: It was Dilip's idea to eliminate Ashok and I went along with it... I worked out a plan to slow-poison Ashok

resolution.value: Confession and investigation by Dhruva leads to solving the murders, with Radha's detailed admission of her poisoning scheme
resolution.quote: The rest as you know is mystery... breathing down my neck, you've charmed me with your mind as well

investigator.value: Dhruva - appears to be the detective/investigator who becomes personally involved with suspect Radha during the investigation
investigator.quote: As these deaths by poisoning puzzle Dhruva, Radha, who worms her way into his life

suspect_architecture.value: Multiple suspects with interconnected motives: Radha (husband's death, revenge), Kavya (Stockholm syndrome, spouse murder), Pravar and Natya (criminals, then victims), each with distinct relationships to victims
suspect_architecture.quote: Could it be Radha under the scanner for her role in the death of her husband Madhu and his mistress Mala

red_herring.value: Suspicion deliberately directed toward Pravar as the poisoner until he becomes a victim himself, misdirecting from the true perpetrator
red_herring.quote: Well the needle of suspicion tilted towards Pravar that was till he perished with his mate, but then who was the one?

clue_fairness.value: Radha's confession reveals her methodology - slow-poisoning plan, train travel timing, and motive to eliminate both Ashok and Dilip
clue_fairness.quote: I worked out a plan to slow-poison Ashok, as and when he embarked on a journey by train

social_world.value: Complex web of marriage, adultery, real estate, criminal underworld, and law enforcement, with characters moving between legitimate and criminal spheres
social_world.quote: Could it be Radha under the scanner for her role in the death of her husband Madhu and his mistress Mala

alibi.value: Radha's calculated alibi construction - avoiding spouse suspicion by eliminating her co-conspirator Dilip and timing murders around train travel
alibi.quote: in all suspicious deaths, the spouse would readily come under the scanner, so I realized that to save my skin

reveal_mechanic.value: Confession extracted through intimate manipulation - Radha reveals her crimes during post-coital vulnerability to the investigating officer
reveal_mechanic.quote: I know what brought you into my bed, and as quid pro quo, I'll satisfy your curiosity

investigator_wound.value: Dhruva's professional and personal boundaries compromised through sexual entanglement with suspect, making him complicit and vulnerable to blackmail
investigator_wound.quote: you are an abettor of the crime. Whatever, in the wake of the murders, breathing down my neck

_meta.title: ebook bs murthy prey on the prowl a crime novel
